# Kida

Kida is a pure-Python template component framework for Python 3.14 and free-threaded Python 3.14t.

Useful entry points:
- /docs/
- /docs/get-started/
- /docs/reference/
- /docs/usage/
- /docs/advanced/
- /docs/tutorials/
- /releases/
- /api/

Package: kida-templates
Repository: https://github.com/lbliii/kida
